allowedClaims: CP2 promotes accepted RFC and active machine-contract surfaces for public operations, preflight/dry-run, trace retrieval, source fidelity, runtime problem reason codes, public read models, and result qualification.
CP2 makes the CP1 release-qualification gate contract-shaped at package level.
runtimeEvidenceRequiredBeforeReadinessCl: executed CP2 conformance runner against implementation runtime
trace retrieval logs for blocked and allowed operations
evidence that preflight/dry-run creates no authoritative side effects
UI/API proof that result qualification is displayed and machine-readable
